title: Come Out of the Pantry
writer: Alice Duer Miller, A.E. Thomas, Douglas Furber
actors: Jack Buchanan, Fay Wray, James Carew
plot: A British aristocrat, Lord Robert Brent, travels to New York City to sell some paintings. He deposits the money from the sale in a bank, but when the bank collapses, he finds himself stranded in America with no money and many bill...
